title: Cobblemon Delta
description: Pokemon Cobblemon Pack - QoL and Performance mods! The server included in the pack has Mega Evolution, Paradox Pokemon, Area Zero, Real Player Gyms, Raids, Dungeons, Pokemon Fishing!
body:
This pack includes a few QOL and Performance mods along side Cobblemon, an expansive Pokémon mod!  This pack is Highly Optimized and runs good on low end hardware. We Recommend Setting your Ram to 4gb. 

This pack is on Cobblemon 1.7.3, the latest version of Cobblemon!

Join Cobblemon Delta via the multiplayer section to play with friends and many other things!

<details>
<summary>Server Features</summary>

- Raids
- Gyms
- Dungeons
- Join/Create Towns
- Breeding
- Wonder Trade System
- GTS (Grand Trading System from Pokemmo)
- Battle Frontier
- Shiny Weekends
- Alpha Pokemon
- Game Corner
- Daycare
- Player Shops
- Champion Tournaments
- Land Claims
- Seasonal Events
- Outbreaks
- Hunting/Breeding Bounties
- Server Block/Item Shop
- and more!

<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

- 3D Crops (Disabled Default)
- Kiece Cobblemon Minimap Icons (Enabled Default)
- Kiece Icons v4.1 VCompat (Enabled Default)
- Cobblemon Emissive Ores (Disabled Default)
- Poke Plaques (Enabled Default)
- Held Item Descriptions (Enabled Default)
- TPC Vitamin Descriptions (Enabled Default)

 </details>

Join our Discord for more info: https://discord.gg/cobblemondelta

Server IP: play.cobblemondelta.com
